allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re, json html = sys.stdin.read\(\) jsons = re.findall\(r'<script type=\\"application/ld\\+json\\">\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.DOTALL\) types = [] for j in jsons: try: p = json.loads\(j\) if '@type' in p: types.append\(p['@type']\) elif '@graph' in p: types.extend\([x.get\('@type'\) for x in p['@graph']]\) except: pass print\('All schema types:', types\) from collections import Counter dupes = [t for t,c in Counter\(types\).items\(\) if c > 1] print\('Duplicates:', dupes if dupes else 'none'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('changelogs:', len\(d.get\('changelogs',[]\)\), [c['tag'] for c in d.get\('changelogs',[]\)]\)")
